title: Analytics Dashboard
description: A high-performance software dashboard designed for data visualization, supporting multi-tenant views, custom canvas chart elements, and dynamic query filtering.
overview: The objective of this project was to simplify complex multi-dimensional datasets for corporate managers. The dashboard had to load instantly, query database metrics efficiently, and present reports with interactive visualizations.

We implemented custom client-side data filtering models using HTML5 Canvas drawing buffers and high-performance Web Worker threads. This guarantees the UI thread remains at 60fps, even when filtering through millions of active data points.

sections.title: Off-Thread Data Processing
sections.description: To keep user interactions smooth while calculating statistical aggregates, all grouping and regression operations are dispatched to a background Web Worker thread.

sections.title: Canvas Chart Rendering
sections.description: Charts are rendered directly to double-buffered HTML5 canvas nodes, avoiding DOM inflation from complex SVG shapes and reducing re-draw lag under heavy animation workloads.

features.title: Dynamic Data Charts
features.description: Highly interactive line, bar, and doughnut charts with customizable coordinate axes, hover tooltips, and image exports.

features.title: Multi-Tenant Architecture
features.description: Designed from the ground up to support multiple client tenants, custom user role configurations, and access levels.

features.title: Live Metric Exports
features.description: Allows users to export visual representations or raw tabular data directly into PDF, CSV, or Excel formats.

results.description: The implementation was deployed to thousands of concurrent users, dramatically speeding up reporting workflows.

stats.label: Smooth chart panning and zooming operations
Reduction in metric aggregation query latency
